preReview.title: Minnesota United v Houston Dynamo: Olsen prepared to make 'bold' changes
preReview.description: Ben Olsen hinted that he could ring the changes for the Houston Dynamo's MLS clash with Minnesota United after their defeat to CF Montreal.

QAData.question: Who won between Minnesota United and Houston Dynamo FC on Thu, 26 Jun 2025 00:30:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Minnesota United won 3–1 over Houston Dynamo FC on Thu, 26 Jun 2025 00:30:00 GMT.
